org_constraint: Begin the first paragraph with the phrase "I hope this email finds you well."
new_constraint: The keyword "find" must be used exclusively as a noun.

Subject: Introduction and Future Goals

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is Alex Chen, and I am currently a senior undergraduate majoring in Computer Science. I am reaching out to express my strong interest in working under your supervision during the upcoming semester. Throughout my academic career, I have dedicated significant time to developing robust algorithms and exploring machine learning applications.

My primary goal is to contribute meaningfully to your department's research initiatives, specifically focusing on data privacy optimization. I aim to gain practical experience in a professional setting and refine my technical skills under your mentorship. Furthermore, I aspire to secure a position where I can collaborate on projects that have tangible impacts on real-world security challenges.

Thank you for considering my inquiry. I have attached my resume for your review and would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with the needs of your lab.

Sincerely,

Alex Chen<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Introduction and Future Goals

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is Alex Chen, and I am currently a senior undergraduate majoring in Computer Science. I am reaching out to express my strong interest in working under your supervision during the upcoming semester. Throughout my academic career, I have dedicated significant time to developing robust algorithms and exploring machine learning applications.

My primary goal is to contribute meaningfully to your department's research initiatives, specifically focusing on data privacy optimization. I aim to gain practical experience in a professional setting and refine my technical skills under your mentorship. Furthermore, I aspire to secure a position where I can collaborate on projects that have tangible impacts on real-world security challenges.

Thank you for considering my inquiry. I have attached my resume for your review and would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with the needs of your lab.

Sincerely,

Alex Chen<|im_end|>
